RAYMOND J. ARATA, JUDGE; V.T.INVENTADO, CLERK; D. DAVENPORT, CSR. DEPT.501. 10:30 AM C/C FOR EXPARTE APPLN FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & ISSUANCE OF WRIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL; DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED & PARTIES AGREED THAT THE PREVIOUS STIPULATION ENTERED ON 10/30/96 REMAINS IN EFFECT. ADDED THE PREVIOUS STIPULATION ARE: DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES @ 174-1/2 MADRID ST, SF ON 6/198; IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE PLAINTIFF WILL APPLY EXPARTE FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, FORFEITURE OF LEASE & RECOVER UNPAID BALANCE.
